divergences.decision: MM compatibility and SDK-worker bootstrap contract: SDK-worker registration is a protobuf wire contract, and compatibility is an explicit quality concern via pinned protobuf/gRPC and multi-language clients.
divergences.detail: The PR changes the existing RegisterClientRspPb field 24 from int32 log_rate_limit to LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config. Reusing an existing field number with a different wire type changes the SDK-worker bootstrap wire contract for existing clients instead of preserving the old field or moving the new message to a new field number. The PR's own added design text also describes reserving old field 24 and adding log_sample_config at field 25, but the actual source diff reuses 24.
divergences.evidence: src/datasystem/protos/share_memory.proto@@ -85,7 +92,7; _mm/socratic/QUESTION_TREE-yuanrong-datasystem.adoc Q2.3.SUC.ClientRegistration and Q4.3; _mm/socratic/docs/arc42/arc42-yuanrong-datasystem.adoc sections 5 and 10.1/10.2; /tmp/gh-aw/agent/pr.diff lines 6829-6844
divergences.fix: Preserve wire compatibility by not retyping field 24. Either keep int32 log_rate_limit at 24 with compatibility behavior and add LogSampleConfigPb on a new field, or reserve 24 and use a new field number only if the MM is deliberately updated to accept the breaking protocol change.
